release_notes: Fixes the most common 'cannot see other workstations after installing from the Microsoft Store' failure. AppxManifest now declares explicit Windows Firewall rules via the desktop2:FirewallRules extension (UDP 50506 + TCP 50505, all profiles), so every install creates the necessary rules in an Enabled state — regardless of whether the user dismissed the Windows Defender Firewall 'Allow this app?' prompt at first launch. Earlier 1.0.x builds relied on the privateNetworkClientServer capability alone to ask Windows to create reasonable defaults, but those auto-created rules could land disabled-on-Private. Also adds an in-app safety net: if no other workstations have responded 25 seconds after the app starts the LAN, a help dialog appears with three numbered recovery steps and a copy-to-clipboard PowerShell snippet that re-enables disabled Private-profile rules (run from an Administrator PowerShell). The dialog auto-dismisses once peers appear.
